overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy neon-lit urban environment. The player character walks along deserted city streets beneath massive concrete overpasses, crosses an intersection, and enters a covered parking garage where an NPC awaits near a futuristic vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon-lit retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the yellow-tiled sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass, passing security cameras mounted on the left wall

entered.detail: weathered gray concrete wall with mounted security cameras and small windows
concrete retaining wall illuminated by continuous cyan neon strip lights and red geometric symbols
massive concrete highway structure with support pillars extending overhead
multiple surveillance cameras mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a deserted sidewalk with distinctive yellow tiles beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The right side features a retaining wall illuminated by cyan neon lights and red symbols, while the left side shows a weathered concrete industrial building with security cameras.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban intersection with distant skyscraper view

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open intersection revealing tall futuristic skyscraper in the distance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide asphalt street intersection toward the glowing commercial signs and distant skyscraper

entered.detail: tall illuminated tower with multiple tiers rising into the foggy night sky
overhead metal structure supporting traffic lights and digital billboards
white painted stripes on the asphalt indicating pedestrian crossing
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide foggy intersection dominated by a tall futuristic skyscraper visible through the haze. The camera crosses the asphalt street beneath traffic lights and digital billboards, moving away from the enclosed sidewalk into the open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner approaching covered parking garage entrance

events.description: turns left at the intersection corner toward the parking garage entrance
approaches and enters the covered parking garage with bright overhead fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left at the street corner and walking toward the illuminated parking garage entrance beneath the overpass

entered.detail: green illuminated street sign reading 'Republic Way' mounted on a pole
large opening leading into a covered parking structure with bright interior lighting
massive cylindrical columns supporting the highway structure above

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the street corner marked by a green 'Republic Way' sign, the camera approaches a covered parking garage entrance beneath the highway overpass. The environment transitions from open foggy street to a sheltered concrete passageway with bright artificial lighting visible inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with graffiti walls and parked vehicles

events.description: enters fully covered parking garage with geometric concrete ceiling and bright fluorescent lighting
slows approach toward NPC standing near the silver futuristic vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking garage toward a man in camouflage standing beside a silver futuristic sedan

notable_agents.action: man in camouflage jacket standing near the silver vehicle, facing the approaching player with hands near his sides

entered.detail: geometric concrete ceiling with bright linear fluorescent light fixtures
teal-colored wall covered with colorful graffiti art and tags
sleek silver futuristic vehicle with angular design and red taillights
second futuristic vehicle parked further back in the garage

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered parking garage with geometric concrete ceiling and bright fluorescent lighting. The camera approaches a man in a camouflage jacket standing beside a silver futuristic sedan, with colorful graffiti visible on the teal walls and a second vehicle parked in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic neon-lit sidewalk into the bright, sheltered interior of an urban parking garage. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, moving along yellow tiles between a weathered industrial building and a retaining wall glowing with cyan neon and red symbols. As the camera leaves the enclosed walkway, the scene opens into a wide, foggy intersection where a futuristic skyscraper looms through the haze beneath digital billboards. The perspective then turns left at a Republic Way sign, transitioning from the open, misty street back into a sheltered concrete passageway. Finally, the camera enters the parking garage, moving under bright fluorescent lights and geometric ceilings toward a man in a camouflage jacket standing beside a silver futuristic sedan.
